mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog (id, user_id, title, content, tags, status, top, open_scope, create_time, update_time, `read`) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{tags}, #{status, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{top, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{openScope, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{read})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, top = #{top}, open_scope = #{openScope}, update_time = #{updateTime}, `read` = #{read} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blog WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM blog WHERE status = 1 AND open_scope = 4 ORDER BY IFNULL(top, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN IFNULL(top, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(`read`, 0) ELSE 0 END DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM blog WHERE status = 1 AND open_scope = 4 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY IFNULL(top, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN IFNULL(top, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(`read`, 0) ELSE 0 END DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT b.* FROM follow f JOIN blog b ON b.user_id = f.target_id WHERE f.user_id = #{viewerId} AND b.status = 1 AND b.open_scope = 2 ORDER BY b.create_time DESC

SELECT b.* FROM blog b WHERE b.status = 1 AND b.open_scope = 3 AND ( b.user_id = #{viewerId} OR ( EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follow f1 WHERE f1.user_id = #{viewerId} AND f1.target_id = b.user_id) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follow f2 WHERE f2.user_id = b.user_id AND f2.target_id = #{viewerId}) ) ) ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.content, b.user_id AS userId, b.create_time AS createTime, b.`read`, b.tags, b.top, b.open_scope AS openScope, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.username AS authorUsername FROM blog b LEFT JOIN user u ON b.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY IFNULL(b.top, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN IFNULL(b.top, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(b.`read`, 0) ELSE 0 END DESC, b.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM blog WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND open_scope = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM blog WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND open_scope = 0
mapper.select: SELECT open_scope FROM blog WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND open_scope IN (1,2,3,4) ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE blog SET open_scope = #{openScope}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND open_scope IN (1,2,3,4)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT tags FROM blog WHERE tags IS NOT NULL AND tags <> ''
SELECT * FROM blog ORDER BY create_time DESC
